records.m_Talk_ENG: My apologies, Star Guide. With supply lines strained, the carriage repairs may take some time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My apologies, Star Guide. With supply lines strained, the carriage repairs may take some time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My apologies, Star Guide. With supply lines strained, the carriage repairs may take some time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: After repairs, we'll also need to conduct a safety check. It'll take at least two weeks...
records.m_Talk_DEU: After repairs, we'll also need to conduct a safety check. It'll take at least two weeks...
records.m_Talk_FRA: After repairs, we'll also need to conduct a safety check. It'll take at least two weeks...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But if you need to leave urgently, I'll try to finish the work as quickly as possible.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But if you need to leave urgently, I'll try to finish the work as quickly as possible.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But if you need to leave urgently, I'll try to finish the work as quickly as possible.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, that won't be necessary.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, that won't be necessary.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, that won't be necessary.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm fine, so don't push yourself. Take your time, Mr. Clinton.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm fine, so don't push yourself. Take your time, Mr. Clinton.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm fine, so don't push yourself. Take your time, Mr. Clinton.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You're here again.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You're here again.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You're here again.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I recall, I warned you these sheep can be aggressive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I recall, I warned you these sheep can be aggressive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I recall, I warned you these sheep can be aggressive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Aggressive sheep are still nothing compared to monsters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Aggressive sheep are still nothing compared to monsters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Aggressive sheep are still nothing compared to monsters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The open view makes it a perfect place to look over the village. It's hard to find a better spot.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The open view makes it a perfect place to look over the village. It's hard to find a better spot.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The open view makes it a perfect place to look over the village. It's hard to find a better spot.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please, pay me no mind.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please, pay me no mind.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please, pay me no mind.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Understood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Understood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Understood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unlike those who tried to curry favor with nobles, he never said much to me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unlike those who tried to curry favor with nobles, he never said much to me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unlike those who tried to curry favor with nobles, he never said much to me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: He kept his distance, only occasionally checking in.
records.m_Talk_DEU: He kept his distance, only occasionally checking in.
records.m_Talk_FRA: He kept his distance, only occasionally checking in.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Watching him wrestle with the sheep wasn't a bad sight.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Watching him wrestle with the sheep wasn't a bad sight.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Watching him wrestle with the sheep wasn't a bad sight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Other shepherds usually keep sheepdogs. I don't see any here.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Other shepherds usually keep sheepdogs. I don't see any here.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Other shepherds usually keep sheepdogs. I don't see any here.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've learned the basics of swordsmanship. Protecting livestock from beasts isn't that difficult.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've learned the basics of swordsmanship. Protecting livestock from beasts isn't that difficult.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've learned the basics of swordsmanship. Protecting livestock from beasts isn't that difficult.

records.m_Talk_ENG: One of my relatives, who's more skilled with the sword, helps protect the village as well.
records.m_Talk_DEU: One of my relatives, who's more skilled with the sword, helps protect the village as well.
records.m_Talk_FRA: One of my relatives, who's more skilled with the sword, helps protect the village as well.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And so, another day passed.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And so, another day passed.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And so, another day passed.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I told you it was dangerous.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I told you it was dangerous.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I told you it was dangerous.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I'd let my guard down, you might've gotten hurt.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I'd let my guard down, you might've gotten hurt.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I'd let my guard down, you might've gotten hurt.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm more than capable of protecting myself. You don't have to worry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm more than capable of protecting myself. You don't have to worry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm more than capable of protecting myself. You don't have to worry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But if you're that concerned... All right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But if you're that concerned... All right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But if you're that concerned... All right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: May I take a look at your sword?
records.m_Talk_DEU: May I take a look at your sword?
records.m_Talk_FRA: May I take a look at your sword?

records.m_Talk_ENG: My sword?
records.m_Talk_DEU: My sword?
records.m_Talk_FRA: My sword?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Smart animals know to keep their distance when they sense a predator's claws.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Smart animals know to keep their distance when they sense a predator's claws.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Smart animals know to keep their distance when they sense a predator's claws.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we sharpen that dull blade, the sheep might feel the threat and calm down.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we sharpen that dull blade, the sheep might feel the threat and calm down.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we sharpen that dull blade, the sheep might feel the threat and calm down.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Are you saying you're skilled in smithing, milady?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Are you saying you're skilled in smithing, milady?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Are you saying you're skilled in smithing, milady?

records.m_Talk_ENG: I may not sound modest saying this, but I know a thing or two about working with weapons.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I may not sound modest saying this, but I know a thing or two about working with weapons.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I may not sound modest saying this, but I know a thing or two about working with weapons.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, even within the Empire, I'm considered one of the best.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, even within the Empire, I'm considered one of the best.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, even within the Empire, I'm considered one of the best.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You sure don't sound modest for someone who claimed to be humble.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You sure don't sound modest for someone who claimed to be humble.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You sure don't sound modest for someone who claimed to be humble.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Two days passed, then three.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Two days passed, then three.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Two days passed, then three.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I yield. I never imagined you'd be a master of swordsmanship.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I yield. I never imagined you'd be a master of swordsmanship.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I yield. I never imagined you'd be a master of swordsmanship.

records.m_Talk_ENG: No, compared to knights renowned across the nine continents, I'm nothing special.
records.m_Talk_DEU: No, compared to knights renowned across the nine continents, I'm nothing special.
records.m_Talk_FRA: No, compared to knights renowned across the nine continents, I'm nothing special.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In fact, you might surpass me when it comes to natural talent...
records.m_Talk_DEU: In fact, you might surpass me when it comes to natural talent...
records.m_Talk_FRA: In fact, you might surpass me when it comes to natural talent...

records.m_Talk_ENG: But for now, your movements feel like you're imitating someone else, and that's holding you back.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But for now, your movements feel like you're imitating someone else, and that's holding you back.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But for now, your movements feel like you're imitating someone else, and that's holding you back.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...There was someone I could never beat after recklessly picking up a sword as a child.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...There was someone I could never beat after recklessly picking up a sword as a child.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...There was someone I could never beat after recklessly picking up a sword as a child.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe I've subconsciously been mimicking him ever since.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe I've subconsciously been mimicking him ever since.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe I've subconsciously been mimicking him ever since.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Never won even once...? That must've been frustrating.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Never won even once...? That must've been frustrating.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Never won even once...? That must've been frustrating.

records.m_Talk_ENG: In that case, allow me to train you myself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: In that case, allow me to train you myself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: In that case, allow me to train you myself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Once you learn the County's swordsmanship, few knights will be able to stand against you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Once you learn the County's swordsmanship, few knights will be able to stand against you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Once you learn the County's swordsmanship, few knights will be able to stand against you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Apologies, but I still don't think I could win.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Apologies, but I still don't think I could win.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Apologies, but I still don't think I could win.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You certainly know how to bruise someone's pride.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You certainly know how to bruise someone's pride.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You certainly know how to bruise someone's pride.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Before I knew it, more than ten days had gone by.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Before I knew it, more than ten days had gone by.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Before I knew it, more than ten days had gone by.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And to my own surprise, I found myself opening up to him.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And to my own surprise, I found myself opening up to him.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And to my own surprise, I found myself opening up to him.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your form has improved quite a bit over the last few days. It's rewarding to teach someone like you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your form has improved quite a bit over the last few days. It's rewarding to teach someone like you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your form has improved quite a bit over the last few days. It's rewarding to teach someone like you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you. Since I asked for your help, even I'm surprised by my own movements at times.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you. Since I asked for your help, even I'm surprised by my own movements at times.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you. Since I asked for your help, even I'm surprised by my own movements at times.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I think I could at least graze my cousin's sleeve in a spar now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I think I could at least graze my cousin's sleeve in a spar now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I think I could at least graze my cousin's sleeve in a spar now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Even saying that much makes me feel like my House's swordsmanship is being slighted.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Even saying that much makes me feel like my House's swordsmanship is being slighted.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Even saying that much makes me feel like my House's swordsmanship is being slighted.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh my, look at the time. I'll head back for the day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh my, look at the time. I'll head back for the day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh my, look at the time. I'll head back for the day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's early. You usually stay until just before sunset.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's early. You usually stay until just before sunset.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's early. You usually stay until just before sunset.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll be leaving soon, so I need to prepare.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll be leaving soon, so I need to prepare.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll be leaving soon, so I need to prepare.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If you'd like to stay with me, I can arrange a room at my lodging.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If you'd like to stay with me, I can arrange a room at my lodging.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If you'd like to stay with me, I can arrange a room at my lodging.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I laid a hand on you, I'd lose my head. Literally.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I laid a hand on you, I'd lose my head. Literally.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I laid a hand on you, I'd lose my head. Literally.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. If you ever do, make sure it's in a romantic setting.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. If you ever do, make sure it's in a romantic setting.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. If you ever do, make sure it's in a romantic setting.

records.m_Talk_ENG: And please, call my name gently while you're at it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: And please, call my name gently while you're at it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: And please, call my name gently while you're at it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...I'll consider it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...I'll consider it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...I'll consider it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Please do. I look forward to your thoughtful consideration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Please do. I look forward to your thoughtful consideration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Please do. I look forward to your thoughtful consideration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: See you again, Allen.
records.m_Talk_DEU: See you again, Allen.
records.m_Talk_FRA: See you again, Allen.

records.m_Talk_ENG: She's tough to deal with. I've never been good with women who close the distance like that.
records.m_Talk_DEU: She's tough to deal with. I've never been good with women who close the distance like that.
records.m_Talk_FRA: She's tough to deal with. I've never been good with women who close the distance like that.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If I were as insensitive as him, there'd be no particular misunderstanding...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If I were as insensitive as him, there'd be no particular misunderstanding...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If I were as insensitive as him, there'd be no particular misunderstanding...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Mm? Did you forget something...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Mm? Did you forget something...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Mm? Did you forget something...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, it's you. I told you this area was dangerous. No trespassing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, it's you. I told you this area was dangerous. No trespassing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, it's you. I told you this area was dangerous. No trespassing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: S-sorry. I was lost in thought and just kept walking.
records.m_Talk_DEU: S-sorry. I was lost in thought and just kept walking.
records.m_Talk_FRA: S-sorry. I was lost in thought and just kept walking.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll head back now. I'm sorry.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll head back now. I'm sorry.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll head back now. I'm sorry.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Your eyes are red. Did something happen?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Your eyes are red. Did something happen?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Your eyes are red. Did something happen?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A-Allen...
records.m_Talk_DEU: A-Allen...
records.m_Talk_FRA: A-Allen...

records.m_Talk_ENG: What... am I supposed to do?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What... am I supposed to do?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What... am I supposed to do?

records.m_Talk_ENG: A royal order to return to the Central Palace?
records.m_Talk_DEU: A royal order to return to the Central Palace?
records.m_Talk_FRA: A royal order to return to the Central Palace?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. The southwestern Kashiras defense line has been breached, and the Demon Lord's army poses a growing threat.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. The southwestern Kashiras defense line has been breached, and the Demon Lord's army poses a growing threat.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. The southwestern Kashiras defense line has been breached, and the Demon Lord's army poses a growing threat.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The royal family seems to think they need to restructure the escort forces.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The royal family seems to think they need to restructure the escort forces.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The royal family seems to think they need to restructure the escort forces.

records.m_Talk_ENG: This is very sudden. If it were truly an official order, a herald and at least a few guards would've been sent.
records.m_Talk_DEU: This is very sudden. If it were truly an official order, a herald and at least a few guards would've been sent.
records.m_Talk_FRA: This is very sudden. If it were truly an official order, a herald and at least a few guards would've been sent.

records.m_Talk_ENG: As you know, we're barely able to maintain our forces.
records.m_Talk_DEU: As you know, we're barely able to maintain our forces.
records.m_Talk_FRA: As you know, we're barely able to maintain our forces.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I understand the situation is hard to accept... but perhaps we should comply for now.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I understand the situation is hard to accept... but perhaps we should comply for now.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I understand the situation is hard to accept... but perhaps we should comply for now.

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's right, Star Guide. You'll be safer in the capital than out here in the provinces.
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's right, Star Guide. You'll be safer in the capital than out here in the provinces.
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's right, Star Guide. You'll be safer in the capital than out here in the provinces.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It might be best to return before His Majesty changes his mind.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It might be best to return before His Majesty changes his mind.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It might be best to return before His Majesty changes his mind.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Understood. It's already late, so we'll depart first thing tomorrow.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Understood. It's already late, so we'll depart first thing tomorrow.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Understood. It's already late, so we'll depart first thing tomorrow.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll inform Mr. Clinton myself.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll inform Mr. Clinton myself.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll inform Mr. Clinton myself.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Rina. That's a new gold ring, isn't it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Rina. That's a new gold ring, isn't it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Rina. That's a new gold ring, isn't it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: As I recall, our funds weren't particularly generous. That didn't come from our budget, did it?
records.m_Talk_DEU: As I recall, our funds weren't particularly generous. That didn't come from our budget, did it?
records.m_Talk_FRA: As I recall, our funds weren't particularly generous. That didn't come from our budget, did it?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Of course not, Star Guide. A villager gave it to me as a thank-you gift.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Of course not, Star Guide. A villager gave it to me as a thank-you gift.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Of course not, Star Guide. A villager gave it to me as a thank-you gift.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unless I've taken leave of my senses, I'd never do anything to burden you.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unless I've taken leave of my senses, I'd never do anything to burden you.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unless I've taken leave of my senses, I'd never do anything to burden you.

records.m_Talk_ENG: My apologies. I must've been mistaken.
records.m_Talk_DEU: My apologies. I must've been mistaken.
records.m_Talk_FRA: My apologies. I must've been mistaken.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's fine. You're tired, that's all. I understand.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's fine. You're tired, that's all. I understand.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's fine. You're tired, that's all. I understand.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll speak to Mr. Clinton for you. Why don't you get some rest?
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll speak to Mr. Clinton for you. Why don't you get some rest?
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll speak to Mr. Clinton for you. Why don't you get some rest?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. That sounds like a good idea.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. That sounds like a good idea.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. That sounds like a good idea.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Excuse me, I'll retire for the night.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Excuse me, I'll retire for the night.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Excuse me, I'll retire for the night.

root.m_Talk_FRA: But if you're that concerned... All right.

root.m_Talk_ENG: May I take a look at your sword?
root.m_Talk_DEU: May I take a look at your sword?
root.m_Talk_FRA: May I take a look at your sword?

root.m_Talk_ENG: My sword?
root.m_Talk_DEU: My sword?
root.m_Talk_FRA: My sword?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Smart animals know to keep their distance when they sense a predator's claws.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Smart animals know to keep their distance when they sense a predator's claws.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Smart animals know to keep their distance when they sense a predator's claws.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If we sharpen that dull blade, the sheep might feel the threat and calm down.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If we sharpen that dull blade, the sheep might feel the threat and calm down.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If we sharpen that dull blade, the sheep might feel the threat and calm down.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Are you saying you're skilled in smithing, milady?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Are you saying you're skilled in smithing, milady?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Are you saying you're skilled in smithing, milady?

root.m_Talk_ENG: I may not sound modest saying this, but I know a thing or two about working with weapons.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I may not sound modest saying this, but I know a thing or two about working with weapons.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I may not sound modest saying this, but I know a thing or two about working with weapons.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes, even within the Empire, I'm considered one of the best.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes, even within the Empire, I'm considered one of the best.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes, even within the Empire, I'm considered one of the best.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You sure don't sound modest for someone who claimed to be humble.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You sure don't sound modest for someone who claimed to be humble.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You sure don't sound modest for someone who claimed to be humble.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Two days passed, then three.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Two days passed, then three.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Two days passed, then three.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I yield. I never imagined you'd be a master of swordsmanship.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I yield. I never imagined you'd be a master of swordsmanship.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I yield. I never imagined you'd be a master of swordsmanship.

root.m_Talk_ENG: No, compared to knights renowned across the nine continents, I'm nothing special.
root.m_Talk_DEU: No, compared to knights renowned across the nine continents, I'm nothing special.
root.m_Talk_FRA: No, compared to knights renowned across the nine continents, I'm nothing special.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In fact, you might surpass me when it comes to natural talent...
root.m_Talk_DEU: In fact, you might surpass me when it comes to natural talent...
root.m_Talk_FRA: In fact, you might surpass me when it comes to natural talent...

root.m_Talk_ENG: But for now, your movements feel like you're imitating someone else, and that's holding you back.
root.m_Talk_DEU: But for now, your movements feel like you're imitating someone else, and that's holding you back.
root.m_Talk_FRA: But for now, your movements feel like you're imitating someone else, and that's holding you back.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...There was someone I could never beat after recklessly picking up a sword as a child.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...There was someone I could never beat after recklessly picking up a sword as a child.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...There was someone I could never beat after recklessly picking up a sword as a child.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Maybe I've subconsciously been mimicking him ever since.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Maybe I've subconsciously been mimicking him ever since.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Maybe I've subconsciously been mimicking him ever since.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Never won even once...? That must've been frustrating.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Never won even once...? That must've been frustrating.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Never won even once...? That must've been frustrating.

root.m_Talk_ENG: In that case, allow me to train you myself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: In that case, allow me to train you myself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: In that case, allow me to train you myself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Once you learn the County's swordsmanship, few knights will be able to stand against you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Once you learn the County's swordsmanship, few knights will be able to stand against you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Once you learn the County's swordsmanship, few knights will be able to stand against you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Apologies, but I still don't think I could win.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Apologies, but I still don't think I could win.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Apologies, but I still don't think I could win.

root.m_Talk_ENG: You certainly know how to bruise someone's pride.
root.m_Talk_DEU: You certainly know how to bruise someone's pride.
root.m_Talk_FRA: You certainly know how to bruise someone's pride.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Before I knew it, more than ten days had gone by.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Before I knew it, more than ten days had gone by.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Before I knew it, more than ten days had gone by.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And to my own surprise, I found myself opening up to him.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And to my own surprise, I found myself opening up to him.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And to my own surprise, I found myself opening up to him.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm...
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm...
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Your form has improved quite a bit over the last few days. It's rewarding to teach someone like you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Your form has improved quite a bit over the last few days. It's rewarding to teach someone like you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Your form has improved quite a bit over the last few days. It's rewarding to teach someone like you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Thank you. Since I asked for your help, even I'm surprised by my own movements at times.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Thank you. Since I asked for your help, even I'm surprised by my own movements at times.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Thank you. Since I asked for your help, even I'm surprised by my own movements at times.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I think I could at least graze my cousin's sleeve in a spar now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I think I could at least graze my cousin's sleeve in a spar now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I think I could at least graze my cousin's sleeve in a spar now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Even saying that much makes me feel like my House's swordsmanship is being slighted.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Even saying that much makes me feel like my House's swordsmanship is being slighted.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Even saying that much makes me feel like my House's swordsmanship is being slighted.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh my, look at the time. I'll head back for the day.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh my, look at the time. I'll head back for the day.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh my, look at the time. I'll head back for the day.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's early. You usually stay until just before sunset.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's early. You usually stay until just before sunset.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's early. You usually stay until just before sunset.

root.m_Talk_ENG: We'll be leaving soon, so I need to prepare.
root.m_Talk_DEU: We'll be leaving soon, so I need to prepare.
root.m_Talk_FRA: We'll be leaving soon, so I need to prepare.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If you'd like to stay with me, I can arrange a room at my lodging.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If you'd like to stay with me, I can arrange a room at my lodging.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If you'd like to stay with me, I can arrange a room at my lodging.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I laid a hand on you, I'd lose my head. Literally.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I laid a hand on you, I'd lose my head. Literally.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I laid a hand on you, I'd lose my head. Literally.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Haha. If you ever do, make sure it's in a romantic setting.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Haha. If you ever do, make sure it's in a romantic setting.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Haha. If you ever do, make sure it's in a romantic setting.

root.m_Talk_ENG: And please, call my name gently while you're at it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: And please, call my name gently while you're at it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: And please, call my name gently while you're at it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...I'll consider it.
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...I'll consider it.
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...I'll consider it.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Please do. I look forward to your thoughtful consideration.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Please do. I look forward to your thoughtful consideration.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Please do. I look forward to your thoughtful consideration.

root.m_Talk_ENG: See you again, Allen.
root.m_Talk_DEU: See you again, Allen.
root.m_Talk_FRA: See you again, Allen.

root.m_Talk_ENG: She's tough to deal with. I've never been good with women who close the distance like that.
root.m_Talk_DEU: She's tough to deal with. I've never been good with women who close the distance like that.
root.m_Talk_FRA: She's tough to deal with. I've never been good with women who close the distance like that.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If I were as insensitive as him, there'd be no particular misunderstanding...
root.m_Talk_DEU: If I were as insensitive as him, there'd be no particular misunderstanding...
root.m_Talk_FRA: If I were as insensitive as him, there'd be no particular misunderstanding...

root.m_Talk_ENG: Mm? Did you forget something...?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Mm? Did you forget something...?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Mm? Did you forget something...?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, it's you. I told you this area was dangerous. No trespassing.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, it's you. I told you this area was dangerous. No trespassing.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, it's you. I told you this area was dangerous. No trespassing.

root.m_Talk_ENG: S-sorry. I was lost in thought and just kept walking.
root.m_Talk_DEU: S-sorry. I was lost in thought and just kept walking.
root.m_Talk_FRA: S-sorry. I was lost in thought and just kept walking.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll head back now. I'm sorry.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll head back now. I'm sorry.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll head back now. I'm sorry.

root.m_Talk_ENG: ...Your eyes are red. Did something happen?
root.m_Talk_DEU: ...Your eyes are red. Did something happen?
root.m_Talk_FRA: ...Your eyes are red. Did something happen?

root.m_Talk_ENG: A-Allen...
root.m_Talk_DEU: A-Allen...
root.m_Talk_FRA: A-Allen...

root.m_Talk_ENG: What... am I supposed to do?
root.m_Talk_DEU: What... am I supposed to do?
root.m_Talk_FRA: What... am I supposed to do?

root.m_Talk_ENG: A royal order to return to the Central Palace?
root.m_Talk_DEU: A royal order to return to the Central Palace?
root.m_Talk_FRA: A royal order to return to the Central Palace?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. The southwestern Kashiras defense line has been breached, and the Demon Lord's army poses a growing threat.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. The southwestern Kashiras defense line has been breached, and the Demon Lord's army poses a growing threat.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. The southwestern Kashiras defense line has been breached, and the Demon Lord's army poses a growing threat.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The royal family seems to think they need to restructure the escort forces.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The royal family seems to think they need to restructure the escort forces.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The royal family seems to think they need to restructure the escort forces.

root.m_Talk_ENG: This is very sudden. If it were truly an official order, a herald and at least a few guards would've been sent.
root.m_Talk_DEU: This is very sudden. If it were truly an official order, a herald and at least a few guards would've been sent.
root.m_Talk_FRA: This is very sudden. If it were truly an official order, a herald and at least a few guards would've been sent.

root.m_Talk_ENG: As you know, we're barely able to maintain our forces.
root.m_Talk_DEU: As you know, we're barely able to maintain our forces.
root.m_Talk_FRA: As you know, we're barely able to maintain our forces.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I understand the situation is hard to accept... but perhaps we should comply for now.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I understand the situation is hard to accept... but perhaps we should comply for now.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I understand the situation is hard to accept... but perhaps we should comply for now.

root.m_Talk_ENG: That's right, Star Guide. You'll be safer in the capital than out here in the provinces.
root.m_Talk_DEU: That's right, Star Guide. You'll be safer in the capital than out here in the provinces.
root.m_Talk_FRA: That's right, Star Guide. You'll be safer in the capital than out here in the provinces.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It might be best to return before His Majesty changes his mind.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It might be best to return before His Majesty changes his mind.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It might be best to return before His Majesty changes his mind.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Understood. It's already late, so we'll depart first thing tomorrow.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Understood. It's already late, so we'll depart first thing tomorrow.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Understood. It's already late, so we'll depart first thing tomorrow.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll inform Mr. Clinton myself.
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll inform Mr. Clinton myself.
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll inform Mr. Clinton myself.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Rina. That's a new gold ring, isn't it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Rina. That's a new gold ring, isn't it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Rina. That's a new gold ring, isn't it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: As I recall, our funds weren't particularly generous. That didn't come from our budget, did it?
root.m_Talk_DEU: As I recall, our funds weren't particularly generous. That didn't come from our budget, did it?
root.m_Talk_FRA: As I recall, our funds weren't particularly generous. That didn't come from our budget, did it?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Of course not, Star Guide. A villager gave it to me as a thank-you gift.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Of course not, Star Guide. A villager gave it to me as a thank-you gift.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Of course not, Star Guide. A villager gave it to me as a thank-you gift.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Unless I've taken leave of my senses, I'd never do anything to burden you.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Unless I've taken leave of my senses, I'd never do anything to burden you.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Unless I've taken leave of my senses, I'd never do anything to burden you.

root.m_Talk_ENG: My apologies. I must've been mistaken.
root.m_Talk_DEU: My apologies. I must've been mistaken.
root.m_Talk_FRA: My apologies. I must've been mistaken.

root.m_Talk_ENG: It's fine. You're tired, that's all. I understand.
root.m_Talk_DEU: It's fine. You're tired, that's all. I understand.
root.m_Talk_FRA: It's fine. You're tired, that's all. I understand.

root.m_Talk_ENG: I'll speak to Mr. Clinton for you. Why don't you get some rest?
root.m_Talk_DEU: I'll speak to Mr. Clinton for you. Why don't you get some rest?
root.m_Talk_FRA: I'll speak to Mr. Clinton for you. Why don't you get some rest?

root.m_Talk_ENG: Yes. That sounds like a good idea.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Yes. That sounds like a good idea.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Yes. That sounds like a good idea.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Excuse me, I'll retire for the night.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Excuse me, I'll retire for the night.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Excuse me, I'll retire for the night.
